title: Ukraine warns of interceptor missile shortage as 19 killed in Kyiv region
summary_full: President Zelensky says Sunday's "massive Russian attack" on Kyiv consisted of 68 missiles and 351 strike drones.
summary_public: President Zelensky says Sunday's "massive Russian attack" on Kyiv consisted of 68 missiles and 351 strike drones.

UA.label: negative
